trans-d_kk_150: Why are you late, you should have been here an hour ago.
trans-d_kk_616: The problem is, I was looking for an export deal, but it's been a long time, I've been looking for a long time!
trans-d_kk_722: I'm looking for a shirt, can you show me a white one?
trans-d_kk_545: If there is a night shift at the company, I might be able to come back early, you can have dinner if you want to
trans-d_kk_256: What kind of soup are you making?
trans-d_kk_633: The exam was not difficult, why didn't you tell us the result?
trans-d_kk_97: You can't eat any more rice
trans-d_kk_288: I usually don't go to the gym on weekends.
trans-d_kk_142: I know, the man who was in the car was shot and killed, right?
trans-d_kk_597: Hurry up, hurry up, the taxi driver is waiting for us at the entrance!
trans-d_kk_366: Please wait, the train hasn't arrived yet.
trans-d_kk_488: You are good at sports, except for swimming, I am not good at anything else.
trans-d_kk_497: How are you? How long did it take you to get to Shanghai from here?
trans-d_kk_523: It was a very cold day, and it started to snow.
trans-d_kk_265: Girl: I've been busy, what's up?
trans-d_kk_41: How many times do you want to go out to eat, I don't care, but I want to know what kind of food you like.
trans-d_kk_430: Why don't you try it again? Have you checked the receipt carefully?
trans-d_kk_394: What time is it now? There is a new restaurant near your school, are you going to go there?
